recommendations.title: Aline
recommendations.overview: A fictionalized biopic of Aline Dieu, a multitalented singer from a musically inclined family.

recommendations.title: Marie-Francine
recommendations.overview: A woman at the age of 50 moves back in with her parents after her husband leave her for a younger woman.

recommendations.title: The Ultimate Accessory
recommendations.overview: The story of Aleksandra and Cyrille, a prominent, trendy, and very well-off Parisian couple, whose life is not quite the same after seven-year-old Alekseï from Russia suddenly pops up in their 100% cashmere, childless home. Aleksandra soon realises t

recommendations.title: The King and the Mockingbird
recommendations.overview: A young shepherdess and a chimneysweep plan to get married and escape the clutches of a tyrannical king in love with her, assisted by the guile of a cheeky mockingbird, the king's archenemy.

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character 3
recommendations.overview: Dona Hermínia will have to rediscover and reinvent herself because her children are forming new families. This supermom will have to deal with a new life scenario: Marcelina is pregnant and Juliano is getting married.

recommendations.title: Dragonslayer
recommendations.overview: A sorcerer and his apprentice are on a mission to kill an evil dragon to save the King’s daughter from being sacrificed according to a pact that the King himself made with the dragon to protect his kingdom.

recommendations.title: Descendants
recommendations.genres: Family, Adventure, Fantasy, TV Movie, Music
recommendations.overview: A present-day idyllic kingdom where the benevolent teenage son of King Adam and Queen Belle offers a chance of redemption for the troublemaking offspring of Disney's classic villains: Cruella De Vil (Carlos), Maleficent (Mal), the Evil Queen (Evie) a

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: The Test
recommendations.overview: Annie lives in harmony with her husband Laurent and her children: the sensitive elders Maximilien and César; the younger Antoine whom Poupi, never-complaining teen, helps raising him. But a positive pregnancy test will disturb the harmony.

recommendations.title: Die Nibelungen: Siegfried
recommendations.overview: Siegfried, son of King Siegmund of Xanten, travels to Worms, capital of the Burgundian kingdom, to ask King Gunther for the hand of his sister, the beautiful Kriemhild.
